title: Interdictor (disambiguation)
content:
'''Interdictor''', or '''''Interdictor''-class''', could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Interdictor]]''', a general term for any [[Starship|ship]] capable of generating a [[gravity well]]
**'''[[Immobilizer 418 cruiser]]''', a class of [[cruiser]] and Interdictor vessel
**[[Interdictor-class Star_Destroyer|'''''Interdictor''-class Star Destroyer''']], a class of [[Star Destroyer]] derived from the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] that was 1,600 [[meter]]s in length, serving as an Interdictor vessel
**[[Interdictor line|'''''Interdictor'' line''']], a line of ships used by the [[Galactic Empire]]
***[[Interdictor-class heavy cruiser|'''''Interdictor''-class heavy cruiser''']], a class of [[heavy cruiser]] of the Star Destroyer design family that was an Interdictor vessel
****[[Interdictor (Interdictor-class)|'''''Interdictor''''']], a specific ''Interdictor''-class Star Destroyer

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Interdictor ship]]''', a term for ships that could produce a [[Interdiction field/Legends|interdiction field]]
**'''[[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 ''Interdictor''-class Heavy Cruiser]]''', built by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]], the most widespread Interdictor type class of ships in service during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The terms ''Interdictor Cruiser'' or ''Interdictor'' usually refer to the ''Immobilizer 418''
**'''[[Interdictor-class cruiser|''Interdictor''-class cruiser]]''', the original hyperspace interdiction cruiser. It served in the [[Old Sith Wars]], thousands of years before the Galactic Civil War
**'''[[Interdictor-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Interdictor''-class Star Destroyer]]''', built by Sienar Fleet Systems using the hull of an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]], and designed to offset the ''Immobilizer 418's'' combat shortcomings
**'''[[Vua'spar interdictor]]''', a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warship/Legends|warship]]
*'''[[TIE/IT Interdictor starfighter]]''', a [[Bomber/Legends|bomber]] class
{{Disambig}}

|de=Abfangschiff
|ja=インターディクター
}}
